title: Typhoon Kestrel moving northwest
content: Synthetic bulletin: Typhoon Kestrel is moving northwest over the western Pacific. Outer rainbands may affect the Miyako and Yaeyama Islands during the next demonstration period.

title: Cloud structure becomes more organized
content: Synthetic satellite interpretation: convection has become more symmetric. The system remains southeast of Okinawa and east of Taiwan.

title: Preparedness messaging for island communities
content: Synthetic preparedness notice: residents in the Miyako and Yaeyama Islands should review transport updates, secure outdoor items, and follow official local guidance. Rough seas are possible in exposed waters.
